requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Cuerpo de Bomberos and Local Building Authority Requirements in the Dominican Republic
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——多米尼加共和国消防部门及地方建筑主管机关要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——多明尼加共和國消防部門及地方建築主管機關要求

summary.en: Fire safety oversight for BESS installations in the Dominican Republic falls under the Cuerpo de Bomberos (fire brigade) and local building and municipal authorities, which have jurisdiction over fixed installation fire protection approvals. BESS installations — particularly utility-scale and C&I systems using lithium-ion battery technologies — present specific fire-safety challenges including thermal-runaway propagation risk, toxic and flammable off-gas generation, and suppression system requirements. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant code for stationary BESS fire installation and is referenced by project engineers and EPCs operating in markets that follow NFPA codes. Formal adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for stationary BESS by Dominican Republic authorities had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the Cuerpo de Bomberos and relevant local building authority before project design is finalised. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based EES systems) provides the international system-level safety framework and may be referenced in project or SIE technical specifications. Project owners and EPCs should confirm the fire-safety design code, suppression system requirements, and inspection approval process with the local authority having jurisdiction before project installation.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国BESS装置的消防安全监管由消防部门（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建筑及市政主管机关负责，这些机构对固定安装消防保护审批拥有管辖权。BESS装置——尤其是采用锂离子电池技术的公用事业规模和工商业系统——存在特定消防安全挑战，包括热失控蔓延风险、有毒和可燃气体产生，以及抑制系统要求。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的固定式BESS消防安装规范，被遵循NFPA规范体系的市场中的项目工程师和EPC承包商引用。截至本数据集日期，多米尼加共和国主管机关专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向消防部门和相关地方建筑主管机关核实。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）提供国际系统级安全框架，可能在项目或SIE技术规格中被引用。项目业主和EPC承包商在项目安装前应与具有管辖权的地方主管机关确认消防安全设计规范、抑制系统要求和检查审批流程。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國BESS裝置的消防安全監管由消防部門（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建築及市政主管機關負責，這些機構對固定安裝消防保護審批擁有管轄權。BESS裝置——尤其是採用鋰離子電池技術的公用事業規模和工商業系統——存在特定消防安全挑戰，包括熱失控蔓延風險、有毒和可燃氣體產生，以及抑制系統要求。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的固定式BESS消防安裝規範，被遵循NFPA規範體系的市場中的項目工程師和EPC承包商引用。截至本數據集日期，多明尼加共和國主管機關專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向消防部門和相關地方建築主管機關核實。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）提供國際系統級安全框架，可能在項目或SIE技術規格中被引用。項目業主和EPC承包商在項目安裝前應與具有管轄權的地方主管機關確認消防安全設計規範、抑制系統要求和檢查審批流程。

standards_or_laws: Cuerpo de Bomberos (Dominican Republic fire brigade) — authority having jurisdiction for fire safety approval of BESS installations; approval required before commissioning

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal adoption specifically for stationary BESS in Dominican Republic unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (common NFPA reference for fire suppression in BESS installations)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (common NFPA reference for fire alarm systems)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the National Fire and Rescue Administration. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Dominican Republic authorities as equivalent to locally applicable fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with documentation aligned with the fire code applicable to the specific Dominican Republic project location before local authority approval.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由国家消防救援局下属地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被多米尼加共和国主管机关认可为等同于当地适用的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在取得地方主管机关批准前补充符合多米尼加共和国特定项目所在地适用消防规范要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由國家消防救援局下屬地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被多明尼加共和國主管機關認可為等同於當地適用的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在取得地方主管機關批准前補充符合多明尼加共和國特定項目所在地適用消防規範要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire safety requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Fire safety installation approval from the Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority is a mandatory project gate for BESS installations in the Dominican Republic. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy locally applicable fire-safety installation requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the applicable standard for BESS installations and determine any Dominican Republic-specific requirements or derogations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with the applicable fire code — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) confirm suppression system equipment certification requirements with the local authority having jurisdiction; (d) engage a qualified fire protection engineer for design review, code compliance verification, and application submission before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：多米尼加共和国所有BESS装置均须取得消防部门（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建筑主管机关的消防安全安装批准，这是强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足当地适用的消防安全安装要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向消防部门和地方建筑主管机关确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为BESS安装的适用标准，并确定任何多米尼加共和国专项要求或豁免；（b）准备符合适用消防规范的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）向具有管辖权的地方主管机关确认抑制系统设备认证要求；（d）在项目调试前聘请合格消防工程师进行设计审查、规范合规核实和申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：多明尼加共和國所有BESS裝置均須取得消防部門（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建築主管機關的消防安全安裝批准，這是強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足當地適用的消防安全安裝要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向消防部門和地方建築主管機關確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為BESS安裝的適用標準，並確定任何多明尼加共和國專項要求或豁免；（b）準備符合適用消防規範的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）向具有管轄權的地方主管機關確認抑制系統設備認證要求；（d）在項目調試前聘請合格消防工程師進行設計審查、規範合規核實和申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority fire safety approval is required for BESS installations in the Dominican Republic before commissioning; NFPA 855 adoption for BESS specifically has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with the authority having jurisdiction
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under National Fire and Rescue Administration procedures

source.publisher: SIE — Superintendencia de Electricidad (Dominican Republic electricity regulator; fire safety authority reference pending direct confirmation from Cuerpo de Bomberos)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire safety installation approval from the Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority is a mandatory gate for BESS installations in the Dominican Republic. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy locally applicable fire-safety installation requirements. Engage the Cuerpo de Bomberos, local building authority, and a qualified fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code (including whether NFPA 855 is formally adopted for stationary BESS) and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 消防部门（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建筑主管机关的消防安全安装批准是多米尼加共和国BESS装置的强制门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足当地适用的消防安全安装要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与消防部门、地方建筑主管机关及合格消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855是否已正式采纳用于固定式BESS）及设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 消防部門（Cuerpo de Bomberos）和地方建築主管機關的消防安全安裝批准是多明尼加共和國BESS裝置的強制門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足當地適用的消防安全安裝要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與消防部門、地方建築主管機關及合格消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855是否已正式採納用於固定式BESS）及設計要求。
